---
name: Performance
about: Performance optimization
title: 'PERF: '
labels: performance
assignees: adityamotale
type: Task

---

## Summary

Briefly describe the performance problem or improvement opportunity. It may include,

- What is slow / inefficient?
- Where is it observed? (module / function / feature)

## Current Observed Behavior

Describe the current performance characteristics, including (but not limited to),

- Throughput / latency (if known)
- Bench results (if available)
- Observed limitations (e.g. Hardware limitations)

## Proposed Optimization

Describe the proposed approach while providing following details,

- What changes are suggested?
- Why should this improve perf?
- Alternative approaches considered?

## Expected Impact

Estimate the imporvements, including (but not limited to),

- Throughput (e.g. +2x)
- Latency reduction (e.g. 24%)
- Resource usage (CPU, memory)

## Notes

Add any additional context, constraints or references
